title: 140 x Artificial White Carnation Flowers Picks for Floral Foam Tributes and Funeral Arrangements
features: QUANTITY: Pack of 140 pristine white artificial flowers, perfect for creating stunning floral arrangements and tributes
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for crafting foam letters, funeral arrangements, memorial tributes, and other commemorative displays
REALISTIC APPEARANCE: Carefully crafted flowers feature lifelike petals and natural-looking stems for authentic presentation
DURABLE DESIGN: Made with quality materials to maintain their appearance and shape throughout extended display periods
EASY ARRANGEMENT: Flexible stems allow for simple positioning and secure placement in floral foam for professional-looking displays
description: Transform your floral tributes and funeral arrangements with this comprehensive set of 140 pristine white artificial flowers. These carefully crafted blooms are specifically designed for use in floral foam applications, making them perfect for creating meaningful memorial displays, letter tributes, and sophisticated funeral arrangements. Each flower is crafted to maintain its elegant appearance throughout your display, offering a lasting tribute without the maintenance requirements of fresh flowers. The versatile collection allows for creative freedom in designing both small intimate pieces and grand arrangements. Whether crafting touching funeral tributes or elegant commemorative displays, these artificial flowers provide a dignified and enduring way to honour cherished memories. The pure white colour scheme offers timeless elegance while maintaining professional presentation standards suitable for memorial services and remembrance ceremonies.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Floral Tributes, Funeral Arrangements, Letter Decorations, Memorial Services
